desc: Fate brings together Parul, a rural girl eager to learn, and Rayan, a sharp city boy. Though he rejects her, she must win his heart and face his grandfather Ashutosh's strict family.

title: Patanjali Yog -By Yog Rishi Swami Ramdev
desc: Baba Ramdev shows how yoga can help you. He explains different yoga poses. These poses can make your life healthier and less stressful. Learn yoga from Baba Ramdev!

title: Tare Dhori Dhori Mone Kori
desc: In ancient Nabadwip, a devout ascetic seeking divinity meets a wealthy young woman longing for love and family, sparking a rare, unforgettable romance that changes lives.

title: Kusum
desc: Kusum is a happy village girl. She loves to talk to her plant and goat. She wants to impress Indrani Ganguly. She will try hard to reach her goal, no matter what!

title: Chirodin E Tumi Je Amar
desc: Arya, a rich man, marries lively Aparna from a simple family. Soon, his dark past and her strange visions lead them into a dangerous mystery that could change everything.

title: Besh Korechhi Prem Korechhi
desc: An intense musical tale blending Gen Z's daring, openhearted approach towards love with Gen X's layered, hesitant romance, unfolding amid family conflict and a teen's hidden pursuit of justice.

title: Saat Pake Bandha
desc: Rahul agrees to marry Pallavi to fulfill his father's wish, but only as a contract. Their relationship takes an unexpected turn when Rahul meets with a life-changing accident.
